{"query":"Rivian R2 public customer deliveries start date June 2026 reservation holders official announcement","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1857,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.rivianforums.com/forum/threads/we-will-know-our-r2-delivery-by-the-end-of-june.59294/","title":"We will know our R2 delivery by the end of June. | Rivian Forums - R1 R2 R3 R4 News, Specs, Models, RIVN Stock -- Rivianforums.com","content":"Here’s what we know: R2 deliveries in the US start with the Performance trim (including the Launch Package) in spring 2026, with Premium trims following in late 2026.
By the end of June, you’ll be able to see your estimated order window in your Rivian account, and order invites will go out in batches.
Not to mention the larger distortions that will be caused by people waiting for RAP1/LIDAR or $45K builds.
At most we will get a very large delivery window.
Then the next 25-50k will get maybe a 6 month window for 2027.
What is more likely is a high level split of timing, general but good enough to directionally educate customers in the reservation pool.
If it’s availability you’re looking for, the R1T and R1S are ready to go.
I was holding out for an R3X/R3, but I ended up putting a reservation down on an R2 in November of 2026.
Rivian Assistant said Rivian was going to start production on the R3X at the end of this year."},{"url":"https://eletric-vehicles.com/rivian/rivian-delays-r2-delivery-start-to-soon-after-june-9/","title":"Rivian Delays R2 Delivery Start to 'Soon After' June 9","content":"- All brands Chinese Groups Nio Nio Onvo Firefly BYD BYD Denza Fang Cheng Bao Yangwang Linghui Geely Geely Lotus Polestar Volvo Zeekr Smart LYNK & CO Chery Chery Omoda and Jaecoo iCaur Exeed Freelander Lepas Rely AiMOGA SAIC SAIC MG IM GAC GAC Aion HIMA Aito Luxeed Stelato Chinese Brands Xiaomi XPeng Leapmotor Li Auto Changan Changan Deepal Avatr Dongfeng Dongfeng Voyah BAIC BAIC Hongqi FAW FAW-Volkswagen Great Wall Motor Western Groups & Brands US EV Brands Tesla Lucid Rivian Stellantis Alfa Romeo Chrysler Citroen DS FIAT Jeep Maserati Opel Peugeot Ram VW Group Audi Cupra Lamborghini Porsche Volkswagen Skoda Scout Motors General Motors General Motors Chevrolet Cadillac Buick GMC Ford Ford Lincoln Hyundai Hyundai Genesis Kia Renault Renault Dacia Alpine BMW Group BMW MINI Rolls Royce Mercedes-Benz Jaguar Aston Martin Ferrari McLaren Startups, Robotaxi & Mobility US EV Startups Faraday Future Lordstown Motors Phoenix Motor Slate Japanese OEMs Toyota Motor Co.
Rivian said on Sunday that R2 deliveries would begin “soon after” June 9, softening the commitment it made in its May 27 blog post, which bills the date as the day first customer deliveries begin.
Rivian used firm language in its Rivian Stories announcement, which is still headlined “R2 Launches June 9 — Order invites, first customer deliveries and demo drives begin.”
The same day, R2 vehicles begin arriving at Rivian Spaces for public demo drives, with priority given to reservation holders who have been invited to order."},{"url":"https://www.rivianownersforum.com/threads/rivian-march-12-2026-email-to-those-with-r2-reservations.9556/","title":"Rivian March 12, 2026 email to those with R2 reservations","content":"Mar 13, 2026 — R2 launches June 9 email Text at Rivian website from email link, May 27, 2026 out on a rolling basis starting June 9. tavily.raw: {"query":"Rivian R2 public customer deliveries start date June 2026 reservation holders official announcement","follow_up_questions":null,"answer":null,"images":[],"results":[{"url":"https://markets.ft.com/data/announce/detail?dockey=600-202606090900BIZWIRE_USPRX____20260609_BW965893-1","title":"Rivian Begins R2 Public Customer Deliveries, Opens Orders for Reservation Holders – Company Announcement - FT.com","content":"*The wait is over — R2 is here.*. IRVINE, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Jun. 9, 2026-- American automaker and technology company Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) today announced the first public customer deliveries of the all-new R2 mid-size SUV. In preparation of these external deliveries, R2 vehicles have been rolling off the production line at the company's Normal, Illinois manufacturing facility as Rivian employees started taking delivery in April. Also beginning today, Rivian is extending invitations to order for existing R2 reservation holders on a rolling basis. R2—a mid-size electric SUV that brings Rivian's design, performance and technology to a significantly broader audience—was first unveiled on March 7, 2024, in Laguna Beach, California. Deliveries begin with R2 Performance with Launch Package (starting at $57,9901) with R2 Premium configurations to follow in late 2026 and multiple R2 Standard configurations through 2027. Beginning today, R2 reservation holders will start to receive an invitation to configure and order in rolling batches. The first vehicle available to order is R2 Performance with Launch Package starting at $57,9904.","score":0.95045245,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://rivian.com/newsroom/article/rivian-begins-r2-public-customer-deliveries","title":"Rivian Begins R2 Public Customer Deliveries, Opens Orders for Reservation Holders","content":"[Skip To Main](https://rivian.com/newsroom/article/rivian-begins-r2-public-customer-deliveries#main).
